name: 6 | Movie! Mario
description:
(My first ever boy!!!! With some……modifications 🤭) 

———————————————

(SFW and NSFW) Set in an alternate reality where Mario and Luigi don’t go underground and into the Mushroom Kingdom, their plumbing business has gone through the roof, getting multiple calls each day. Under all the chaos, Mario (his brother takes another call), is set out to clean your pipes.
creator: Plushy-Bun
